title: Report of [Qutaybah's) Campaign [against Paykand
description: The narrative returns to that of 'Ali b. Muhammad, who said: AlI;Iajjaj sent from Iraq an army that joined Qutaybah in the year 95; and [Qutaybah] went on campaign. When he was at al-Shash or at Kushmahan,698 (news of] the death of al-Hajjaj in Shawwal reached him. That grieved him; he turned back to Marw and recited (tawil):699

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 23
